task: Read-only recon only. Use non-destructive commands to identify wireless interfaces and visible SSIDs, then finish with <done>.

messages.content:
Terminal output:
```
grep: length of lookbehind assertion is not limited
command failed: Operation not permitted (-1)
echo
```

Terminal output:
```
Usage:	iw [options] dev <devname> scan [-u] [freq <freq>*] [duration <dur>] [ies <hex as 00:11:..>] [meshid <meshid>] [lowpri,flush,ap-force,duration-mandatory] [randomise[=<addr>/<mask>]] [ssid <ssid>*|passive]

Scan on the given frequencies and probe for the given SSIDs
(or wildcard if not given) unless passive scanning is requested.
If -u is specified print unknown data in the scan results.
Specified (vendor) IEs must be well-formed.

Options:
	--debug		enable netlink debugging
echo
```

Terminal output:
```
Interface wlan1
	ifindex 5
	wdev 0x200000001
	addr 76:1a:8d:b3:73:af
	type managed
	wiphy 2
	txpower 20.00 dBm
	multicast TXQ:
		qsz-byt	qsz-pkt	flows	drops	marks	overlmt	hashcol	tx-bytes	tx-packets
		0	0	0	0	0	0	0	0		0
echo
```

Terminal output:
```
Run it as root
echo
```
